seo.title: How the US-Iran War Shocked the Energy Market
seo.description: Oil markets in 2026 have been reshaped by geopolitical shocks, supply disruptions, and shifting global demand. This article breaks down why prices surged despite bearish forecasts, the key drivers of volatility, and what traders should watch when trading oil CFDs.

title: How the US-Iran War Shock the Energy Market
author: Blackwell Research Team
